project.title: My NPM Packages Showcase - Next.js
project.description: A demonstration platform showcasing my published NPM packages with live examples, usage documentation, and interactive implementation previews.
project.detailedDescription: Developed a clean, professional showcase platform using Next.js to demonstrate the functionality and real-world applications of my published NPM packages. The platform features live implementation examples, comprehensive usage documentation, and interactive component previews. Implemented performance optimization techniques including lazy loading and efficient bundle management, resulting in a 35% reduction in page load times and 20% improvement in user engagement. Each package includes installation guides, API documentation, and practical use cases to help developers understand and implement the solutions effectively.

project.title: Job Desktop Dashboard - React Interface
project.description: A modern desktop dashboard interface for job management with custom-built carousel components and intuitive user experience design.
project.detailedDescription: Designed and developed a sophisticated desktop dashboard interface using ReactJS with a focus on performance and custom component implementation. Created a custom carousel system from scratch without relying on external libraries like Swiper.JS, demonstrating deep understanding of React hooks and DOM manipulation. Built a comprehensive job management dashboard with statistics visualization, task tracking, and user-friendly navigation system.
features: Custom-built carousel component without external libraries

project.title: Autonomous QA Agent - AI Testing Pipeline
project.description: An AI-driven testing pipeline that autonomously generates, executes, and self-heals unit tests for JavaScript and TypeScript projects using LangGraph and Docker.
project.detailedDescription: Engineered a sophisticated testing agent that systematically ingests codebase files, performs topological sorts to build dependency-aware test plans, and executes tests inside a persisted Docker alpine container. Implemented a self-healing retry loop that feeds terminal logs back to the LLM to recursively resolve test failures, reducing manual debugging efforts by up to 90%.
features: Iterative Self-Healing and automatic test repair

project.title: Hierarchical Agentic AutoML System
project.description: An autonomous, multi-tier Automated Machine Learning pipeline orchestrated using a Hierarchical LangGraph Subgraph Pattern to clean datasets, recommend models, and execute validation splits.
project.detailedDescription: Architected a hierarchical LangGraph system that automates the machine learning lifecycle. Decoupled data analytics (schema stabilization, 9-stage preprocessing, validation splitting) from ML code generation and execution. Features a secure containerized Docker sandbox to train models and compile performance scorecards, presenting findings through a Human-in-the-Loop gateway.
features: Automated 80/20 data partition and validation splitting
Human-in-the-Loop target and algorithm selection gateway

project.title: MongoDB MCP Server
project.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes 29 database administration, schema management, CRUD, and aggregation tools for MongoDB.
project.detailedDescription: Developed a complete Model Context Protocol (MCP) server integration for MongoDB. The server implements 29 distinct tools across Database Administration, Schema & Field Management, CRUD Operations, and Aggregations. Features safe validation schema definitions, bidirectional relationship mapping (one-to-one/one-to-many), system protection rules, and robust error codes, enabling AI assistants to safely interact with databases.
features: Bidirectional relationship tracking & automatic lookup indexing
Type-safe CRUD operations with bulk inserts/updates
System database and collection protection safety rules
Detailed execution logging and unified error code schema

services.title: Frontend Development
services.description: Building responsive, interactive web applications using Next.js with TypeScript, styled with TailwindCSS and enhanced with ShadCN UI components. Expert in state management with Redux Toolkit and Context API, plus specialized libraries like ReactFlow for complex visualizations.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description: Developing robust APIs and server-side applications using NestJS with TypeScript. Experienced in database design, authentication systems, microservices architecture, and implementing scalable backend solutions with proper error handling and security measures.

services.title: Full Stack Solutions
services.description: End-to-end application development combining modern frontend frameworks with powerful backend systems. Specializing in creating seamless integrations, optimized performance, and maintainable codebases with proper testing and deployment strategies.

services.title: UI/UX Implementation
services.description: Converting design mockups into pixel-perfect, responsive interfaces with smooth animations and optimal user experience. Focus on accessibility, performance optimization, and cross-browser compatibility using modern CSS techniques and component libraries.

about.title: Transforming ideas into scalable digital solutions
descriptions: I am a passionate full-stack developer specializing in modern web technologies. With expertise in both frontend and backend development, I create seamless, scalable applications that deliver exceptional user experiences while maintaining robust server-side architecture.

My approach combines clean, maintainable code with cutting-edge technologies like Next.js, NestJS, and TypeScript. I believe in building solutions that not only meet current requirements but are also future-ready and easily scalable.
highlights: Strong focus on clean architecture and scalable solutions
Experience with both SQL and NoSQL databases
Proficient in modern deployment and DevOps practices
Passionate about continuous learning and staying updated with latest technologies

experiences.title: Software Developer

responsibilities: Engineered a multi-tenant SaaS platform for 10+ enterprise clients, enhancing scalability and modularity.
Designed and implemented a role-based access control (RBAC) system, reducing security incidents by 85% and supporting 50+ role configurations.

Streamlined partner and dealer onboarding processes, reducing setup time by 50% and empowering 100+ partners to manage workflows independently.
